data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a consultation must be completed before booking a surgery. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation that the necessary consultation was completed prior to the booking of the procedure. The closest evidence relates to booking confirmations, but they do not address the prerequisite of having a consultation completed, indicating a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that a consultation was completed before booking the procedure.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
